title: prunus pinetorum
intro: Prunus pinetorum, also known as the Pineapple Tree or Pineapple Prunus, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Prunus pinetorum has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, and has been used to treat conditions like diarrhea and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional folk remedies.
